chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No. D – 24 of 2024 [Fareed Raza & others v. Province of Sindh & others] DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) Fresh Case. 1. For orders on Misc. No.126 of 2024. 2. For order on Office Objection No.20. 3. For orders on Misc. No.127 of 2024. 4. For orders on Misc. No.128 of 2024. 5. For hearing of Main Case. 05-01-2024 Syed Akhtar Hasan, Advocate for the Petitioners. ********** 1] Urgency granted. 3] Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 2,3-4] The Petitioners are functionaries of the Town Municipal Corporation, Liaquatabad, Karachi. They seem to be aggrieved by the fact that while the Respondent No.5 has filed a suit against them in respect of a government primary school, he has also made a complaint to the Anti-Corruption Establishment, who has issued notices to the Petitioners calling upon them to provide certain record in respect of the affairs of the said school. The contention of the counsel is that whilst the civil suit is pending, no action can be taken by the Anti-Corruption Establishment. The contention is misconceived as the proceedings, if any, by the Anti-Corruption Establishment can continue in parallel with the civil suit. With that observation, the petition is misconceived; same is dismissed alongwith pending application(s) in limine. JUDGE JUDGE SHABAN*
